repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.cli: argument and flag parsing, subcommands, exit codes, stdin/stdout/stderr separation, TTY-vs-pipe detection, and signal handling for a composable command-line tool
build a React dashboard page with charts and a date picker

retrieval_query: cli command line argument flag parsing subcommand exit code stdin stdout stderr tty pipe signal help composability

validation_smoke.name: code.cli L3 validation smoke
signals: exit code is 0 on success and non-zero on each documented failure
data goes to stdout and diagnostics to stderr (verified via redirection)
output adapts to TTY vs pipe (no color/prompt when piped)
SIGINT leaves no partial output or orphaned children
--help and usage exit cleanly with code 0

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.cli diagnosis smoke
signals: errors or progress printed to stdout, polluting piped data
color codes or prompts emitted when output is piped
exit code 0 returned despite a failure
tool hangs waiting on stdin with no TTY check
Ctrl-C leaves a half-written file or zombie child
